title: AI and the Job Market in 2026
summary: AWS Developers discusses how AI is reshaping tech hiring and job hunting in 2026. The video covers networking strategies, personal branding, and argues that junior developers remain valuable despite AI automation, using historical job market evolution as precedent.
writeup: AWS Developers examines how AI is reshaping tech hiring and job hunting in 2026, focusing on practical career moves rather than speculation. The video covers networking strategies and personal branding, and argues that junior developers remain valuable despite AI automation. The case draws on historical job market evolution as precedent for why entry-level roles persist as technology changes.
